Title: Kled
Alias(es): High Major Commodore of the First Legion Third Multiplication Double Admiral Artillery Vanguard Company
Lord Major Admiral of the Second Legion's Forward Artillery-Cavalry Multiplication
Age: CurrentAt least 998 years old Timeline BornEarlier than 2 BN Edit (Kled)

mainContent.title: Appearance
mainContent.textContent: Kled is a slender, pale-furred yordle with short white pointy teeth and a violent eye. His robes are composed of a red ribbon holding his hair, a (sometimes invisible) piercing on his left ear, a hat with a steel spike pointing upwards on the front and two arrows pointing forward on the top of the hat, steel shoulder pads, leather sleeves, steel bracelets, a red belt, leather boots with steel plates, and other garments with a distinct palette of red, teal, brown and grey. The most distinctive ornaments of his attire are an axe, a gun, and a hat. He also has a scar on his face where his right eye used to be.

mainContent.title: Personality
mainContent.textContent:
Kled is a stereotypical hillbilly, with a distaste for "city folk" and a fierce sense of independence from society. Paranoid and territorial, Kled views all of Noxus as his property, and will gladly kill anyone he views as a trespasser. Though Kled doesn't answer to the Trifarix, he has fought alongside and inspired Noxian forces with his fearless and violent attitude for many centuries, and has been decorated with many honors. Because of his military titles (which may or may not be made up), Kled takes pride in his accomplishments and uses them as a means to prove his superiority over others.

Kled is very unfriendly, cursing often and is prone to violent outbursts and shouting. Kled shows a greedy side with his insistence on claiming land, and often places signs marking "Property of Kled" whenever he thinks something is his. Because of his short temper, he constantly berates his Drakalops steed, Skaarl, for her cowardly and unreliable nature. However, Kled does have a soft spot for his untrusty steed, and is overjoyed whenever she returns to help him in battle. Though his chaotic nature makes others wonder if Kled is mentally unstable, Kled considers himself to be a genius.

children.title: Darius
children.textContent: Kled believes Darius has a nice axe and should learn to use it.

children.title: Katarina
children.textContent: Kled considers Katarina to have no moxie and to be no more sinister than Skaarl's farts.

children.title: Riven
children.textContent: Kled almost likes Riven, because she is a pure noxian girl.

children.title: Sion
children.textContent: Kled fought alongside Sion back when Sion still lived, but doesn't think much of the new undead abomination.

children.title: Skaarl
children.textContent: Kled considers everyone (including himself, bizarrely) his rival and he sees Skaarl as his only friend.

children.title: The Yordle Species
children.textContent: Though they are cute, Kled considers yordles to be unwanted guests, and does not feel remorse for killing them, nor for feeding them to Skaarl.
